headline: The Zacks Analyst Blog Highlights Texas Instruments, Newmont, EOG Resources, Weyco and Peoples Bancorp of North Carolina

headline: Newmont (NEM) Valuation Check After Gold Rebound And Renewed Sector Momentum
summary: Newmont (NEM) is back on investors’ radar after a rebound in gold prices, improving geopolitical conditions, renewed sector interest, and a strong record of beating earnings estimates that is supporting recent stock momentum. See our latest analysis for Newmont. The recent rebound in gold and easing geopolitical tensions helped Newmont log a strong 7 day share price return of 9.42%, while its 1 year total shareholder return of very large magnitude points to momentum that has built over a...
